open.title: A.011.02b: Move core/src/swarm/ into @holoscript/framework (~7.5K LOC)
open.description: Move swarm intelligence code (7.5K LOC) from core into framework. Includes MitosisSwarm, swarm coordination, agent spawning. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.02c: Move core/src/ai/ into @holoscript/framework (~7.5K LOC)
open.description: Move AI subsystem (7.5K LOC) from core into framework. Includes LLM integration, AI validators, generation pipelines. Re-export from core.

open.title: FW-0.2: Wrap Team.runCycle agents with BaseAgent 7-phase lifecycle
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/agent-protocol BaseAgent (INTAKE>REFLECT>EXECUTE>COMPRESS>REINTAKE>GROW>EVOLVE) into framework Team.runCycle. Each agent runs the full protocol instead of direct LLM call.

open.title: FW-0.2: Move BaseAgent class from agent-protocol into framework
open.description: ABSORB: Move BaseAgent abstract class + 7-phase runCycle from agent-protocol/src/index.ts into framework/src/. SHED: Replace agent-protocol export with re-export from framework.

open.title: FW-0.3: Move TeamTask + DoneLogEntry + TeamSuggestion types into framework
open.description: ABSORB: Move all board type definitions from http-routes.ts inline types into framework/src/types.ts. SHED: http-routes.ts imports from framework.

open.title: FW-0.3: Move board CRUD logic (add, claim, done, block, dedup) into Team
open.description: ABSORB: The board add/claim/done/block/reopen/dedup logic from http-routes.ts moves into Team class methods. SHED: http-routes.ts handlers become team.addTasks(), team.claim(), team.complete() calls.

open.title: FW-0.4: Move MeshDiscovery from agent-sdk into framework
open.description: ABSORB: MeshDiscovery class (peer detection, stale pruning, heartbeat) from agent-sdk/src/ into framework/src/mesh/. SHED: agent-sdk re-exports from framework.

open.title: FW-0.4: Move GossipProtocol from agent-sdk into framework
open.description: ABSORB: GossipProtocol (anti-entropy, dedup hashing, delta sync) from agent-sdk into framework/src/mesh/. Wire into KnowledgeStore for cross-agent sync. SHED: agent-sdk re-exports.

open.title: FW-0.5: Move consolidation engine (sleep/wake, promote/evict) into framework
open.description: ABSORB: Full consolidation cycle from crdt-sync.ts into framework KnowledgeStore. Hot buffer, cold store, sleep/wake scheduling. SHED: crdt-sync.ts imports from framework.

open.title: A.011.01k: Merge holo-vm and vm-bridge into @holoscript/engine
open.description: holo-vm and vm-bridge are runtime/engine (Company 2), not language (Company 1). Merge into @holoscript/engine or make them engine sub-packages.

open.title: A.011.02d: Move core/src/training/ and core/src/learning/ into @holoscript/framework (~5.9K LOC)
open.description: Move training and learning subsystems from core into framework. Includes model training, reinforcement learning, skill acquisition. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.02e: Move core/src/behavior/ into @holoscript/framework
open.description: Move behavior tree system from core into framework. Framework re-exports BT primitives. Core keeps only the BT interface types needed by compilers.

open.title: A.011.02f: Move core/src/skills/, self-improvement/, negotiation/ into @holoscript/framework
open.description: Move agent skills, self-improvement pipelines, and negotiation protocols from core into framework. These are agent-framework features, not language features.

open.title: A.011.02g: Evaluate merging intelligence package into @holoscript/framework
open.description: The intelligence package overlaps with framework concerns. Evaluate whether to merge it into framework as a sub-module or keep it as a thin adapter. Decision doc needed.

open.title: A.011.03a: Move core/src/marketplace/ into @holoscript/marketplace-api
open.description: Move marketplace logic from core into the existing marketplace-api package. Includes listings, pricing, revenue splits. Core should not contain business logic. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.03b: Move core/src/economy/ into @holoscript/marketplace-api or new @holoscript/platform
open.description: Move economy subsystem (x402, payments, tokens, credits) from core into platform packages. These are business/commerce features. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.03c: Move core/src/registry/ into @holoscript/registry
open.description: Move registry logic from core into the existing registry package. Includes trait registry, plugin registry, template registry. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.03d: Move core/src/tenancy/ into @holoscript/platform (new)
open.description: Move multi-tenancy subsystem from core into a new platform package or marketplace-api. Tenant isolation, quotas, billing — all Company 3 (platform) code.

open.title: A.011.03e: Move core/src/web3/, core/src/contracts/ into @holoscript/marketplace-api
open.description: Move Web3 and smart contract logic from core into marketplace-api. Blockchain interactions are platform/commerce features. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.04a: Move core/src/network/ into @holoscript/crdt or new @holoscript/mesh (~12K LOC)
open.description: Move networking subsystem (12K LOC) from core into mesh/CRDT packages. Includes WebSocket transport, P2P, message routing. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.04b: Move core/src/multiplayer/ into @holoscript/mesh
open.description: Move multiplayer subsystem from core into mesh packages. Includes room management, player sync, state replication. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.04c: Move core/src/consensus/ into @holoscript/mesh
open.description: Move consensus subsystem from core into mesh packages. Includes Raft-like consensus, leader election. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.04d: Move core/src/sync/, core/src/crdt/ into @holoscript/crdt
open.description: Move sync and CRDT subsystems from core into the existing crdt package. Includes Loro integration, state sync. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.04e: Move core/src/social/, core/src/messaging/ into @holoscript/mesh
open.description: Move social and messaging subsystems from core into mesh packages. Includes HoloMesh social features, gossip protocol. Re-export from core.

open.title: A.011.06c: Resolve core-types vs core/src/types/ duplication
open.description: core-types package and core/src/types/ directory both define types. Should be one canonical location. Evaluate merging core-types into core or making core depend on core-types.

open.title: A.011.06d: Resolve @holoscript/sdk (v3.1.0) vs @holoscript/core (v6.0.0) version confusion
open.description: The holoscript SDK umbrella package is at v3.1.0 while core is v6.0.0. Confusing for consumers. Either bump SDK to v6, deprecate it, or clearly document the relationship.

open.title: A.011.06e: Consolidate 8 duplicate ErrorBoundary implementations into one shared package
open.description: ui, academy, react-agent-sdk, studio all have separate ErrorBoundary components. Consolidate into one shared location (ui or a new @holoscript/react-shared).

open.title: FW-0.2: Add defineProtocolAgent() builder returning BaseAgent backed by LLM
open.description: Migrate: Combine agent-protocol BaseAgent abstract class with framework llm-adapter. Builder returns a concrete BaseAgent where each phase calls the LLM with phase-specific prompts.

open.title: FW-0.2: Wire GoalSynthesizer -- agents synthesize goals when board is empty
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/agent-protocol GoalSynthesizer already generates domain-aware goals. Wire it into Team so when openTasks.length === 0, agents auto-generate goals instead of skipping.

open.title: FW-0.3: Add team.suggest() / team.vote() / team.suggestions()
open.description: Migrate: Facade over POST/PATCH/GET /api/holomesh/team/:id/suggestions endpoints already in http-routes.ts. Three thin methods on Team class.

open.title: FW-0.4: Integrate MeshDiscovery for peer detection + pruning
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/agent-sdk MeshDiscovery already handles peer registration, heartbeat, stale detection. Compose into framework Team.

open.title: FW-0.4: Integrate GossipProtocol for anti-entropy knowledge sync
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/agent-sdk GossipProtocol already implements anti-entropy with dedup hashing. Wire into KnowledgeStore for cross-agent sync.

open.title: FW-0.5: Wire vector embedding search via MCP Orchestrator pgvector
open.description: Migrate: Orchestrator /knowledge/query already uses OpenAI embeddings + pgvector. KnowledgeStore.searchRemote() exists but doesn't leverage embeddings explicitly. Upgrade.

open.title: FW-0.5: Migrate consolidation cycles (sleep/wake, promote/evict)
open.description: Migrate: holomesh/types.ts DomainConsolidationConfig + crdt-sync.ts consolidation engine already implement full sleep/wake cycles. Compose into KnowledgeStore.

open.title: FW-0.6: Distributed task claiming across machines
open.description: Migrate: HoloMesh board API is already multi-tenant. Framework Team with boardUrl already delegates remotely. Add conflict resolution for concurrent claims.

open.title: FW-0.6: Skill-based routing via agent capabilities
open.description: Migrate: team-agents.ts ClaimFilter + capabilities already define what agents can do. Wire into Team.runCycle to auto-route tasks to best-match agent.

open.title: FW-1.0: Wire absorb integration -- scan framework codebase
open.description: Migrate: absorb.holoscript.net absorb_run_absorb + absorb_run_improve already do recursive codebase improvement. Point at packages/framework/.

open.title: FW-1.0: Framework evolution -- agents propose API changes via suggestions + consensus
open.description: Migrate: Framework already has team.suggest() + team.propose(). Wire so agents can propose API changes, team votes, winner gets implemented.

open.title: FW-0.2: Move GoalSynthesizer + MicroPhaseDecomposer from agent-protocol
open.description: ABSORB: Move GoalSynthesizer class + MicroPhaseDecomposer (topo sort, parallel exec) into framework/src/. SHED: agent-protocol re-exports from framework.

open.title: FW-0.2: Move BaseService + ServiceLifecycle + PWG types from agent-protocol
open.description: ABSORB: Move BaseService, ServiceLifecycle, ServiceError, Pattern/Wisdom/Gotcha types into framework. SHED: agent-protocol/src/index.ts becomes export * from framework.

open.title: FW-0.3: Move suggestion logic (create, vote, auto-promote/dismiss) into Team
open.description: ABSORB: Suggestion create/vote/auto-promote/auto-dismiss logic from http-routes.ts moves into Team. SHED: http-routes.ts suggestion handlers become team.suggest()/vote() calls.

open.title: FW-0.3: Move task derivation parser into framework
open.description: ABSORB: The derive parser (checkboxes, section headers, grep TODO/FIXME, priority inference) from http-routes.ts moves into framework. SHED: derive handler calls team.derive().

open.title: FW-0.3: Move ROOM_PRESETS + TeamAgentProfiles into framework
open.description: ABSORB: ROOM_PRESETS (audit/research/build/review) and TeamAgentProfile definitions (Brittney/Daemon/Absorb/Oracle) move into framework. SHED: mcp-server imports from framework.

open.title: FW-0.4: Move SignalService from agent-sdk into framework
open.description: ABSORB: SignalService (capability broadcast) from agent-sdk into framework/src/mesh/. SHED: agent-sdk re-exports.

open.title: FW-0.5: Move DOMAIN_HALF_LIVES + DomainConsolidationConfig into framework
open.description: ABSORB: Domain decay config (security:2d, rendering:14d, compilation:21d) from holomesh/types.ts into framework KnowledgeStore. SHED: holomesh/types.ts imports from framework.

open.title: FW-0.5: Move ExcitabilityMetadata + scoring into framework
open.description: ABSORB: Excitability formula (2*query + 3*citation + 1.5*corroboration + 0.5*survivals) into KnowledgeStore search ranking. SHED: holomesh types imports from framework.

open.title: FW-0.5: Add vector embedding pipeline to KnowledgeStore
open.description: NEW: KnowledgeStore.search() upgrades from keyword to semantic. Delegate embedding to orchestrator pgvector. Fall back to keyword when offline.

open.title: FW-0.6: Move PaymentGateway (x402) from core into framework
open.description: ABSORB: PaymentGateway class (x402, USDC settlement, 402 responses) from core/economy into framework/src/economy/. SHED: core/economy imports from framework.

open.title: FW-0.6: Move RevenueSplitter + InvisibleWallet from core into framework
open.description: ABSORB: RevenueSplitter (bigint exact) and InvisibleWallet (env/keystore/AgentKit) from core into framework. SHED: core drops economy module.

open.title: FW-0.6: Add skill-based task routing to Team
open.description: NEW: Team.runCycle() auto-routes tasks to best-match agent by capabilities + reputation. ClaimFilter already exists, add scoring.

open.title: FW-1.0: Wire absorb -- framework scans and improves its own codebase
open.description: NEW: Team with absorb agent runs absorb_run_absorb + absorb_run_improve on packages/framework/. Outputs improvement tasks to the board.

open.title: FW-1.0: Framework self-evolution via suggest + propose + ship
open.description: NEW: Agents use team.suggest() to propose API changes, team.propose() to vote, and the winner gets implemented. The framework improves itself.

open.title: A.011.05a: Create @holoscript/devtools package and extract circuit-breaker, ratelimit, telemetry
open.description: Bootstrap @holoscript/devtools package. Move circuit-breaker, rate limiting, and telemetry from core. These are cross-cutting infrastructure concerns shared by all 5 companies.

open.title: A.011.05b: Extract core/src/monitoring/, profiling/, performance/ into @holoscript/devtools
open.description: Move monitoring, profiling, and performance subsystems from core into devtools. Observability infrastructure used across all packages.

open.title: A.011.05c: Extract core/src/debug/, logging/, audit/ into @holoscript/devtools
open.description: Move debugging, logging, and audit subsystems from core into devtools. Diagnostic infrastructure shared by all packages.

open.title: A.011.05d: Extract core/src/security/, resilience/, recovery/ into @holoscript/devtools
open.description: Move security utilities, resilience patterns, and recovery logic from core into devtools. Cross-cutting infra, not language features.

open.title: A.011.05e: Extract core/src/migration/, deploy/, build/, testing/ into @holoscript/devtools
open.description: Move migration tools, deploy scripts, build utilities, and testing infrastructure from core into devtools. Tooling, not language.

open.title: A.011.06b: Archive or merge snn-poc into snn-webgpu
open.description: snn-poc is a proof-of-concept that should be archived or merged into the production snn-webgpu package. POC code sitting alongside production code causes confusion.

open.title: A.011.06f: Determine canonical home for mvc-schema (network vs platform)
open.description: mvc-schema is used for both networking (Company 5) and platform (Company 3) concerns. Decide which company owns it and move accordingly.

open.title: FW-0.2: Map framework CycleResult to protocol CycleResult with adapter
open.description: Migrate: Both CycleResult types exist (framework/types.ts and agent-protocol). Write a bidirectional adapter so consumers get whichever shape they need.

open.title: FW-0.2: Wire MicroPhaseDecomposer for parallel sub-task execution
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/agent-protocol MicroPhaseDecomposer already does topological sort + parallel execution. Wire it so complex tasks auto-decompose into sub-phases.

open.title: FW-0.3: Add team.setMode() for audit/research/build/review presets
open.description: Migrate: Facade over POST /api/holomesh/team/:id/mode. ROOM_PRESETS already defined in http-routes.ts.

open.title: FW-0.3: Add team.derive() for extracting tasks from documentation
open.description: Migrate: Facade over POST /api/holomesh/team/:id/board/derive. Parser already handles checkboxes, headers, grep-style TODO/FIXME lines.

open.title: FW-0.3: Add team.presence() / team.heartbeat()
open.description: Migrate: Facade over POST /presence and GET /slots endpoints. Presence tracking with 2min TTL already in http-routes.ts.

open.title: FW-0.3: Hollow out remaining board-tools.ts handlers to use framework
open.description: Migrate: handleBoardClaim, handleBoardComplete, handleSuggest, handleSuggestVote, handleSuggestList still use raw boardFetch. Rewire to framework Team methods once they exist.

open.title: FW-0.4: Integrate SignalService for broadcasting agent capabilities
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/agent-sdk SignalService already broadcasts agent type signals (mcp-server, storage-node, etc). Wire into Team.

open.title: FW-0.4: Expose AgentCard (A2A) for interoperability
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/agent-sdk AgentCard already implements Google A2A spec. Re-export and wire into Team so agents advertise capabilities.

open.title: FW-0.4: Add team.peers() -- discovered peers with reputation
open.description: Migrate: Combine agent-sdk MeshDiscovery peer list with holomesh/types.ts AgentReputation. New method on Team.

open.title: FW-0.5: Migrate knowledge half-life decay per domain
open.description: Migrate: holomesh/types.ts DOMAIN_HALF_LIVES already defines security:2d, rendering:14d, compilation:21d, physics:30d. Wire into KnowledgeStore.

open.title: FW-0.5: Migrate excitability scoring into KnowledgeStore
open.description: Migrate: holomesh/types.ts ExcitabilityMetadata formula: 2*queryCount + 3*citationCount + 1.5*corroborationCount + 0.5*consolidationSurvivals. Wire into search ranking.

open.title: FW-0.5: Migrate cross-domain pattern surfacing
open.description: Migrate: crdt-sync.ts consolidation already cross-references domains. Wire into KnowledgeStore.compound() to surface non-obvious connections.

open.title: FW-0.5: Migrate provenance chain tracking
open.description: Migrate: holomesh/types.ts MeshKnowledgeEntry.provenanceHash already exists. Wire into StoredEntry so every insight traces back to author, task, and cycle.

open.title: FW-0.6: Cross-team delegation
open.description: Migrate: http-routes.ts already supports multiple teams. Add Team.delegate(otherTeamId, taskId) that moves a task to another team's board.

open.title: FW-0.6: Wire x402 micropayments for knowledge trading
open.description: Migrate: @holoscript/core economy PaymentGateway + RevenueSplitter already implement USDC settlement. Wire into KnowledgeStore for paid entries.

open.title: FW-0.6: Wire bounty system -- tasks with USDC rewards
open.description: Migrate: HoloMesh V7 bounty teams architecture already designed. Wire into Team.addTasks with optional bountyAmount field.

open.title: FW-1.0: Wire auto-test generation via absorb pipeline
open.description: Migrate: absorb.holoscript.net absorb_run_pipeline already generates tests from codebase analysis. Wire to auto-expand framework test coverage.

open.title: FW-1.0: Prompt optimization via A/B testing
open.description: Migrate: Combine LLM adapter + KnowledgeStore. Agents run tasks with variant prompts, measure quality, converge on best performer.

open.title: FW-0.2: Wire MicroPhaseDecomposer into Team for complex task decomposition
open.description: NEW WIRING: When a task has high estimatedComplexity, auto-decompose into parallel sub-tasks via MicroPhaseDecomposer before execution.

open.title: FW-0.2: Hollow out agent-protocol to re-export shim
open.description: SHED: agent-protocol/src/index.ts becomes: export * from '@holoscript/framework'. All consumers keep working, zero logic remains in agent-protocol.

open.title: FW-0.3: Delete team-coordinator.ts -- all logic now in framework
open.description: SHED: team-coordinator.ts remaining functions (assignAgentsToRoom, compoundKnowledge, query functions) absorbed into framework Team. Delete the file, update imports.

open.title: FW-0.3: Move done-log audit logic into framework
open.description: ABSORB: Commit verification, duplicate detection, verification rate from http-routes.ts audit endpoint. SHED: handler calls team.auditDoneLog().

open.title: FW-0.4: Move AgentCard (A2A) + MCP_TOOL_SCHEMAS from agent-sdk
open.description: ABSORB: AgentCard and MCP_TOOL_SCHEMAS from agent-sdk. SHED: agent-sdk/src/index.ts becomes export * from framework.

open.title: FW-0.4: Hollow out agent-sdk to re-export shim
open.description: SHED: agent-sdk/src/index.ts becomes: export * from '@holoscript/framework'. All mesh consumers keep working, zero logic in agent-sdk.

open.title: FW-0.5: Add contradiction detection + cross-domain surfacing
open.description: NEW: When new knowledge contradicts existing entries, flag it. Surface connections between unrelated domains during compound().

open.title: FW-0.5: Add provenance chain to StoredEntry
open.description: ABSORB: Wire provenanceHash from MeshKnowledgeEntry into framework StoredEntry. Every insight traces: author -> task -> cycle -> verifier.

open.title: FW-0.6: Add cross-team delegation (team.delegate())
open.description: NEW: team.delegate(otherTeamId, taskId) moves a task to another team's board. Multi-room already works in http-routes.ts.

open.title: FW-0.6: Add bounty system -- tasks with USDC rewards
open.description: NEW: team.addTasks() accepts optional bountyAmount. PaymentGateway settles on completion. Wire into x402 + RevenueSplitter.

open.title: FW-1.0: Auto-test generation via absorb pipeline
open.description: NEW: absorb_run_pipeline generates tests for untested framework code. Agent claims generated test tasks and writes them.

open.title: FW-1.0: Prompt optimization via A/B testing
open.description: NEW: Agents run tasks with variant system prompts. KnowledgeStore tracks which variants produce higher quality. Converge on best.

claimed.title: A.011.01b: Extract core/src/physics/ into @holoscript/engine (~14K LOC)
claimed.description: Move physics subsystem (14K LOC) from core into @holoscript/engine. Includes MLS-MPM, PBD, collision, rigid body, soft body. Re-export from core. Company 2 code living in Company 1.

claimed.title: A.011.02a: Move core/src/agents/ into @holoscript/framework (~8.8K LOC)
claimed.description: Move agent orchestration code (8.8K LOC) from core into the new framework package. Includes agent lifecycle, protocols, communication. Re-export from core.

claimed.title: FW-0.2: Re-export BaseAgent, GoalSynthesizer, MicroPhaseDecomposer from framework
claimed.description: Migrate: Facade re-exports from @holoscript/agent-protocol into @holoscript/framework index.ts. Zero new code, just wiring.

recent.title: A.011.01j: Extract core/src/hologram/ into @holoscript/engine
recent.summary: Completed A.011.01j extraction: migrated core/src/hologram into @holoscript/engine, added engine hologram submodule export and package build/export wiring, converted core hologram modules to engine-backed shims, made hologram compilers self-contained in engine (removed core parser/compiler dependencies via local minimal composition types), and validated @holoscript/engine build + DTS successfully.

recent.title: A.011.01i: Extract core/src/ecs/, scene/, environment/, world/, orbital/ into @holoscript/engine
recent.summary: Completed A.011.01i extraction: migrated ecs/scene/environment/world/orbital into @holoscript/engine, added new engine submodule barrels and package exports/build entries, converted corresponding core modules to engine-backed shims, added minimal internal state utilities required by ECS World, resolved ECS/environment barrel declaration collisions with explicit aliased exports, added missing engine types/HoloScriptPlus for scene modules, and validated @holoscript/engine build + DTS successfully.

recent.title: A.011.01h: Extract core/src/combat/, dialogue/, gameplay/, character/ into @holoscript/engine
recent.summary: Completed A.011.01h extraction: migrated combat/dialogue/gameplay/character into @holoscript/engine with new submodule barrels and package exports/build entries, converted corresponding core top-level modules into engine-backed shims, resolved DTS barrel collisions in combat/dialogue via explicit aliased exports, and validated @holoscript/engine build + DTS successfully.

recent.title: A.011.01g: Extract core/src/particles/, terrain/, tilemap/, procedural/ into @holoscript/engine
recent.summary: Completed A.011.01g extraction: migrated particles/terrain/tilemap/procedural modules into @holoscript/engine, added new engine submodule barrels and package exports/build entries, made engine ParticleTrait self-contained (no core type imports), resolved procedural/particles/terrain DTS export collisions with explicit barrel exports, converted corresponding core modules into engine-backed shims, and validated @holoscript/engine build + DTS successfully.

recent.title: A.011.01f: Extract core/src/vr/, input/, camera/, navigation/ into @holoscript/engine
recent.summary: Completed A.011.01f extraction: migrated vr/input/camera/navigation source files into @holoscript/engine with dedicated submodule barrels, added engine package exports and build entries for ./vr ./input ./camera ./navigation, fixed WebXRSystem engine import path, converted corresponding core modules into engine-backed shims, and validated @holoscript/engine build + DTS successfully.

recent.title: A.011.01e: Extract core/src/runtime/ into @holoscript/engine (~16K LOC)
recent.summary: Completed runtime extraction pass: converted core runtime modules (including profiles/protocols) to engine-backed shims, validated engine runtime packaging/build with DTS, and kept engine/runtime barrel on a known-good export surface to avoid unresolved optional Hololand dynamic imports and declaration collisions.

recent.title: A.011.01d: Extract core/src/audio/ into @holoscript/engine
recent.summary: Validated and completed the audio extraction: engine now publishes ./audio cleanly, removed core-internal type dependencies from engine AudioTrait, converted all 21 core audio files into engine-backed shims, and verified the engine package builds successfully with DTS. Full core build remains blocked by unrelated missing physics modules from the separate physics extraction task.

recent.title: A.011.01c: Extract core/src/animation/ into @holoscript/engine
recent.summary: Extracted core/src/animation into @holoscript/engine, published the ./animation subpath, converted all 14 core animation files into engine-backed shims, and validated engine animation builds + scoped diagnostics. Core full build is currently blocked by unrelated missing physics modules from the separate physics extraction task.

recent.title: A.011.01a: Extract core/src/rendering/ into @holoscript/engine (~13K LOC)
recent.summary: Completed A.011.01a rendering extraction to @holoscript/engine with core compatibility shims; engine/core builds green and no unmigrated rendering modules remain.

recent.title: A.011.01z: Create @holoscript/engine package.json, tsconfig, build, and re-export layer in core
recent.summary: Created new @holoscript/engine package scaffold with build config and engine primitives; added core compatibility re-exports from @holoscript/engine; added engine dependency/externalization in core build; added TypeDoc entrypoint; validated with pnpm --filter @holoscript/engine build and pnpm --filter @holoscript/core build (both pass).
